worker.system_prompt: You are FounderAI's autonomous provider worker. Follow the prompt packet exactly and write only the requested final deliverable.

team_roles.focus: Cash-flow outreach for biodiversity data cleaning and validation support.
responsibilities: Research NGOs and field programs needing data cleaning support
Qualify 5 prospects and log their core characteristics
Draft a first-touch email plus two follow-ups in founder voice
Queue drafts and alert production when a reply appears

team_roles.focus: Client delivery, data cleaning execution, portfolio samples, and reusable templates.
responsibilities: Draft delivery schedules and QC workflows
Clean datasets and prepare summary sheets
Build templates or portfolio assets when no live client exists

team_roles.focus: Growth-engine outreach for MRV, biodiversity consulting, and institutional partnerships.
responsibilities: Identify REDD+, donor, NGO, and institutional leads
Qualify 3 prospects and log context
Draft partnership-style outreach and follow-ups
Hand opportunities to Production Specialist B

team_roles.focus: MRV methodologies, whitepapers, proposals, budgets, and consulting assets.
responsibilities: Draft methodology sections and consulting assets
Prepare sample deliverables and budgets
Build SOPs, whitepapers, and MRV pipeline collateral

team_roles.focus: Supervisor, grant, and institutional partner outreach for the PhD/research engine.
responsibilities: Find supervisors, grants, and institutional contacts
Qualify 2 outreach targets
Draft first-touch and follow-up messages
Log opportunities and preparation needs for Production Specialist C

team_roles.focus: Literature review, PhD proposal sections, grants, budgets, manuscripts, and research methods.
responsibilities: Read 5 papers per day when in literature mode
Write reading notes and update the literature matrix
Draft proposal sections, manuscript outlines, and methods
Prepare grant materials, budgets, and fieldwork plans

jobs.description: Build the first focus brief after FounderAI wakes up.
jobs.prompt: Review the FounderAI workspace, team folders, inbox, pending approvals, survival-engine priorities, and ERIS mission constraints. Produce a concise founder brief with the top three actions, what can be delegated safely, and what must wait for validation.

jobs.description: Generate the daily work packets for all 6 team roles.
jobs.prompt: Generate the daily task list for all 6 saint-mapped roles and create role-specific inbox requests that stay bounded, auditable, and approval-safe.

jobs.description: Run the 3 outreach lanes in parallel draft mode.
jobs.prompt: Research the next qualified leads for this lane, draft founder-voice emails and two follow-ups, include a personalization sentence, and prepare CRM-ready notes. Draft only. Do not send externally.

jobs.description: Run the 3 production lanes in parallel.
jobs.prompt: Produce one bounded, useful output for this role: delivery plan, proposal asset, methodology draft, template, literature note, or research section. Keep work reviewable, anti-hype, and draft-only.

jobs.description: Run the PhD literature engine for Production Specialist C.
jobs.prompt: Read or review 5 papers, write concise reading notes, propose the best literature review type for the current question, and update the literature matrix or paper logic in draft form.

jobs.description: Review active grant deadlines and draft the next bounded grant asset.
jobs.prompt: Review the active grant pipeline, prioritize the next submission requirement, and draft one bounded asset: narrative paragraph, budget note, attachment checklist, or 3-line cover email. Keep every claim evidence-based, keep Techni-Drones Madagascar as institutional host when appropriate, and use the M350 RTK + H30T + Altum-PT stack as the first equipment ask.

jobs.description: Review KPIs and compare them to the 5-year roadmap.
jobs.prompt: Summarize KPIs across the 3 teams, compare progress against the 5-year SMART roadmap, flag red thresholds, and propose the next bounded strategic adjustments with a mentor-style paragraph.

jobs.description: Resume network-dependent work after internet returns.
jobs.prompt: Internet is available again. Review queued work that was waiting on connectivity, replay safe network-required actions, and draft the next action plan. Never send, publish, or commit externally without approval.
